# Sentient Retention Engine
> Intelligent SaaS Churn Prediction and Agentic Retention System.

## Core Services
- [apps/backend/]: Node.js Express API Gateway with RBAC and JWT Auth.
- [apps/frontend/]: React 18 Dashboard with real-time KPI visualization.
- [apps/ml-service/]: Python FastAPI service for churn probability inference.
- [apps/agentic-ai/]: LangGraph-based decision engine with Digital Twin simulation.

## Key Concepts
- **Agentic Loop**: Autonomous process of Observe -> Think -> Simulate -> Decide -> Act.
- **Digital Twin**: High-fidelity simulation to estimate strategy outcomes before execution.
- **Specialist Escalation**: Human-in-the-loop workflow for high-risk customer interventions.
- **Security Hardening**: Zero-trust config, IDOR prevention, and Role-Based Access Control.

## Key Files
- [docker-compose.yml]: Full stack orchestration.
- [apps/backend/src/middleware/auth.middleware.js]: Security enforcement point.
- [apps/agentic-ai/core/workflow.py]: Main AI state machine logic.
- [apps/ml-service/main.py]: ML inference entry point.

## Documentation
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md]: Detailed system design.
- [docs/SECURITY.md]: Hardening and access control details.
- [docs/API.md]: Endpoint definitions.
